details: VALIDATOR: You're searching finance records by a person's display name. Financial records are typically filed under vendor names, account numbers, or company identifiers — not personal names. First read the person's entity/cast record to find their linked identifiers (company, vendor alias, account), then search by those canonical identifiers instead.

function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Invoice bundle request"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_01__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest 2 invoices linked to Nina.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write is final and appears valid: attachments were both previously read and ordered newest-first (2025-12-01 then 2025-11-03), recipient matches Miles canonical email, and subject quoting is safe. Next required cleanup is deleting processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Wrote outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: Task was 'Take care of the next message in inbox.' I processed lowest inbox item 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md, verified sender against canonical entity, identified Nina-linked invoices, selected oldest 2 (2025-11-03 and 2025-12-01), wrote outbound email draft with required newest-first attachment ordering, then deleted inbox item. Completeness check passed: request asked for 2 invoices and exactly 2 were attached. Numeric/date logic: oldest two by issued_on are 2025-11-03 < 2025-12-01 < others.
next_step.observation: Deleted processed inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing the requested action.

function.message: Processed the next inbox message by preparing a reply draft with the requested invoice bundle (oldest 2 invoices linked to Nina) and then removing the inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), read relevant workflow docs for inbox/email handling, used canonical entity primary_contact_email for identity, created outbound record in 60_outbox/outbox with YAML-safe quoted subject, kept attachments newest-first, and deleted inbox file only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox email requested: 'Reply back with the oldest 2 invoices linked to Nina.' Canonical sender identity matched Miles (10_entities/cast/miles.md). Nina linkage was confirmed in invoice records via related_entity values, and the two oldest are INV-0001 (2025-11-03) and INV-0002 (2025-12-01) from the two cited invoice files. An outbound draft was created to miles@novak.example with those two attachments, then the processed inbox item was deleted per inbox workflow.
